Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 90 -1 68 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}I'm calling in regard to a recent change in Tartarus...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 90 -1 68 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}It seems that a path that had been blocked off is now open.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 90 -1 68 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}I thought it prudent to inform you.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 90 -1 68 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}Well then... I wish you a safe journey.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Elizabeth said that a previously[n]blocked path is now open.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I should check it out next[n]time I go to Tartarus.[n]{f 1 1}
